vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.

cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All parts and features are traceable to the initial design brief.
verify.rule: Each part_tree child and geometry_op must be mutually traceable by id/name.

verify.value: Interfaces are reciprocal and named with exact neighboring subsystem labels.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to heat dissipation from avionics bay.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling measures or redesign avionics bay for better heat dissipation.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during assembly due to complex interfaces.
risk.mit: Include detailed assembly instructions and visual aids for each interface.

risk.desc: Structural integrity concerns at critical joints under dynamic loads.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough structural analysis and testing on critical joints.

risk.desc: Electrical connectivity issues due to complex harness routing.
risk.mit: Ensure all electrical connections are tested and validated before final assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress through service access ports.
risk.mit: Design and implement waterproof seals for all service access ports.

physics_paths.description: Carries wing loads into fuselage spine
Dissipates heat from avionics bay
Allows nacelle tilt motion

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate wing spar socket for seamless load transfer
Ensure harness routing for clean electrical connections
Optimize avionics bay for efficient heat dissipation

verification_focus.description: Verify mass budget against design requirements
Perform structural integrity tests on critical joints
Ensure all electrical connections are functional

generated_parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

requirements: Carries nacelle loads into fuselage spine
Interfaces with fuselage spine, V-tail, ruddervator, stabilizer, landing gear mount, gear leg

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.
Each risk item needs: id, desc, mit
Training-quality rule: make part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable by id/name.

Reciprocal interface rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.
Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment due to bolted connection between wing spar and fuselage spine.
risk.mit: Use precise alignment tools during assembly and ensure proper torque settings.

risk.desc: Risk of improper fit for snap-fit connections on V-tail and ruddervator mounts.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough fit tests before final assembly and ensure all components meet specified tolerances.

risk.desc: Press-fit connections on landing gear mount may cause difficulty in disassembly.
risk.mit: Include detailed disassembly instructions and provide appropriate tools for maintenance.

risk.desc: Service ports may become obstructed during assembly, hindering maintenance access.
risk.mit: Ensure service ports are easily accessible and clearly marked during assembly.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance around nacelle tilt axis may restrict movement.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance dimensions to ensure smooth operation of nacelle tilt mechanism.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to bolted connections.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment guides and torque specifications.

risk.desc: Cooling channel may not provide sufficient airflow under high load.
risk.mit: Increase channel size and add additional vents for improved airflow.

risk.mit: Revise access cover design for easier removal and installation.

risk.desc: Structural reinforcement ribs could interfere with wing spar socket integration.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance around the tilt axis may cause binding.
risk.mit: Increase clearance around the tilt axis to ensure smooth operation.

physics_paths.path_description: Load from the rotor is transferred through the tilt axis and bearing seats into the wing structure.
Motion from the servo motor drives the tilt axis via a worm gear mechanism.
Human access to the motor and ESC for maintenance and replacement.

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate structural reinforcement ribs with the wing spar socket.
integration_opportunities.potential_impact: Enhances structural integrity and load distribution.

integration_opportunities.description: Optimize access cover design for easier motor and ESC replacement.
Improve cooling channel design to enhance heat dissipation from the motor and ESC.
integration_opportunities.potential_impact: Reduces thermal stress and extends component lifespan.

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection and CMM for critical dimensions
